name: Coconut Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a medium saucepan, combine egg yolks and Half & Half; mix well.
3. Add sugar, flour, and salt. Cook over medium heat until thick, stirring constantly.
4. Remove from heat. Stir in butter, vanilla, and 1 cup of coconut. Pour into baked pie shell.
5. Spread meringue over filling, sealing edges to crust, and sprinkle with 1/3 cup remaining coconut.
6. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
Meringue:
1. Beat egg whites until soft peaks form.
2. Gradually add vanilla and cream of tartar, beating until stiff.
